channel.title: IEEE Micro | Computer System Architecture Lab

item.title: One paper accepted to IEEE Micro (Journal, SCIE)
item.description: One paper was accepted to IEEE Micro. Our paper presents an accelerator architecture using logarithmic number systems, called LogFlex, which applies an adaptive log-domain quantization scheme based on data distributions to provide higher accuracy with low-precision quantized data formats. LogFlex enables near-FP16 accuracy while consuming 33% less energy than FP8-based accelerators.
